title: PriorityChef Mortar and Pestle Set, Heavy Duty Natural Granite, Make Fresh Guacamole at Home, Solid Stone Grinder Bowl, Herb Crusher, Spice Grinder, 1.5 Cup Size, Unpolished Grey
description:
About this item
BUILT TO LAST A LIFETIME, This thick, unpolished solid stone grinder is heavy duty and chip resistant carved from 1 solid piece of naturally formed granite. Your heavy duty guacamole bowl grinder will look great on any countertop and will do for many years to come.
MAKE DELICIOUS GUACAMOLE, SALSA, PESTO and MORE! Home made, fresh delicious guacamole, pesto and more can be made on demand with this granite mortar and pestle set in the comfort of your home. Create healthy sauces with ease using your granite molcajete that the whole family can enjoy.
GRIND, BLEND and MASH THE FRESHEST FLAVORS: This mortar and pestle set small size with a 2 cup capacity and sturdy 6.5 inch pestle gets the job done quickly. Crush, grind and pound herbs, nuts, spices and more to release natural flavors and aromas easily with minimum fuss.
DON'T SCRATCH YOUR COUNTERTOP: This unpolished black granite stone mortar and pestle is a beast! Super sturdy and heavy enough to leave out on display, but that could cause scratches to your countertop. That's why we have INCLUDED 2 NON SLIP COUNTERTOP PROTECTORS that will protect your valuable counter from any possible scratches.
PREP YOUR GARLIC - FAST: Our customers love using the PriorityChef mortar and pestle large set to crush garlic. So, we INCLUDED A SILICONE GARLIC PEELER for that removes those sticky, papery skins quickly without getting garlic fingers.
reviews_5s: Very well made and perfect size.Perfect size for mincing spices. It looks great.It's heavy and servicable. Makes short work of smashing herbs and veggies and holds a lot of product. I see no use in a smaller mortar. This stays put on the counter and the pestle is perfect for my grip.Awesome quality and works well.It is heavy which works out for the grinding, it doesn't slide around on my table or counters. Easy to clean in the sink. I got what I wanted.I bought a different one online for a gift, that was half the size for the same price (not realizing it) so I ordered this one on Amazon. For the price and quality, I feel I got an excellent deal!!! This thing is tough AND beautiful. My sister totally loved it!!!Very heavy and large quality setAlways wanted one of these. Didn't realize that you have to season it similar to cast iron. Make sure to read the cleaning/seasoning method that they give you. I live ha e it available for quick grounding of few herbs etc.Great product. I just was not expecting it to be so big and heavy. I wanted it for spices and it really is too much to grind some spices. I will probably great another smaller mortar and pestle set I that will be easier to bring out and put away when I'm not using it. I'm not sure what I would use such a big Mortar and Pestle set for, but I will probably keep this somewhere in the back of a cabinet for that one time that I need it.Perfect
reviews_1s:
The box was torn up upon delivery and the pestle is entirely missing.I agree with some of the other critical reviews. Mine came broken, dusty and dirty in the box and I use the term box loosely. This box was not constructed well, sides were split, the top was torn off and the mortar was falling out of the box even before I opened the package it came in. The pestle was broken in half and the mortar was chipped at the bottom. Also, the little pads they sent to protect your countertop from scratches were nothing more than black pieces of paper. Of course, this is stone and it's going to be dirty to some degree but it felt like they made it, let it dry and threw it in a box.

I packaged the mortar and pestle back up, better than I got it, and returned it the next day. Went to Target and bought one that was much better and polished on the outside.Much, much smaller than portrayed. Very disappointed. It looks a lot bigger onlineNo the whole thing was completely shattered and brokenBowl had a chip and no handle was includedI did not know the surface of granite was porous. Grinding anything in this results in both mortar and pestle requiring washing. The instructions say do not use soap, but just water does not look adequate. Wish I'd kept the box. I have a smaller mortar, made of marble, much easier to clean.This came shattered in pieces. I got a box of rocks.......It doesn’t have enough space when you’re trying to make guacamoleBought this for my mother in law. Tossed it after a few days. I was so disappointed. Whatever this is made out of it will shave off into your food.I ordered 2 of theses so i can gift one to my stepmother an the other to my aunt but when i opened them to check for damages 1 of the pestles are missing from its box
